flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Walla Walla Community College rose 17% between 2017 and 2020 ($12.0k → $14.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Walla Walla Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (4.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Walla Walla Community College rose 30% between 2021 and 2024 (1.9k → 2.4k).
